candidate_definition_hints.text: Notebooks demonstrating example applications of the cleanlab library

This repo contains code examples of how to use [cleanlab](https://github.com/cleanlab/cleanlab) with specific real-world models/datasets, how its underlying algorithms work, how to get better results via advanced functionality, and how to train certain models used in some cleanl…
